message:
chore: gitignore dot-prefixed agent target dirs and analysis output

Add .target-*/ pattern for agent build directories like .target-greenmountain/
that weren't caught by the existing target-*/ pattern (no dot prefix). Also
ignore user_requests_output.txt (one-off session analysis output).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ temp_*.rs
 # Alternative target directories (benchmarks, tests, checks)
 target_*/
 target-*/
+.target-*/
 
 # Web test artifacts
 web/node_modules/
@@ -98,5 +99,8 @@ flamegraph.svg
 perf.data
 perf.data.old
 
+# One-off analysis output
+user_requests_output.txt
+
 # Beads daemon rotated logs
 .beads/daemon-*.log.gz
